session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. Show any failures in full.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target for testing

session.tool_result:

=== Fast CI ===

--- Format Check --- 1633 files already formatted

... [111 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here are the results:
## Failure Summary
**Prettier Check** found code style issues in 2 files that need reformatting: 1. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
## Full Test Results
All other checks passed:
| Component | Status | Details | |-----------|--------|---------| | **Lint** | PASSED | All checks passed | | **Format Check** | PASSED | 1633 files already formatted | | **Prettier Check** | **FAILED** | Code style issues in 2 files | | **Markdown Check** | PASSED | - | | **Exec Reference Check** | PASSED | .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date | | **ty (Type Check)** | PASSED | All checks passed | | **Unit Tests (erk)** | PASSED | 5530 passed in 22.47s | | **Tests (erk-dev)** | PASSED | 136 passed in 4.28s | | **Tests (erk-statusline)** | PASSED | 115 passed in 0.85s | | **Tests (erkbot)** | PASSED | 114 passed in 2.19s |
## Files Requiring Prettier Formatting
The following files need to be formatted with Prettier's `--write` flag: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
